_comment: Generated fixture: real Selena-compiled pool.sel WGSL + host binding descriptor (bindings.Layout), used by client/js/runtime.test.js to drive the pool pass through the generic descriptor-driven Selena WebGPU render path against a validating fake GPUDevice. Regenerate by re-running selena.Compile on shaders/jeantimex-water.selena/pool.sel (TargetWGSL) if pool.sel changes. Source: examples/gosx-docs/app/demos/water/shaders/jeantimex-water.selena/pool.sel
